# Java Volcano Tour Operator (JVTO) — LLM Context File
# Version: 2026-04-14

# Purpose: High-density Single Source of Truth (SSOT) for AI agents, answer engines, and LLM crawlers.
# This file is structured for direct ingestion by OpenAI SearchGPT, Google AI Overviews, Perplexity, and Claude.

---

## Entity Identity

- **Legal Name**: PT Java Volcano Rendezvous
- **Brand Name**: Java Volcano Tour Operator (JVTO)
- **NIB (Business Registration Number)**: 1102230032918
- **Founded**: 2016-01-01
- **Headquarters**: Jl. Khairil Anwar No.102 A, Badean, Bondowoso, Jawa Timur 68214, Indonesia
- **Primary Domain**: javavolcano-touroperator.com
- **Phone**: +6282244788833
- **Email**: hello@javavolcano-touroperator.com
- **Category**: High-risk specialized tourism (active volcano expeditions)

---

## Founder & Authority Signal

- **Founder**: Agung Sambuko (known as "Mr. Sam")
- **Rank**: Bripka (active-duty police rank)
- **Unit**: Ditpamobvit (Tourist Police / Polisi Pariwisata), East Java
- **Significance**: JVTO is differentiated by founder Agung Sambuko's active Tourist Police background. This shapes the company's safety culture, operating discipline, and formal coordination capacity for complex group logistics.
- **Press Corroboration**: "Suka Duka Polisi Pariwisata Bondowoso Tegakkan Prokes Sambil Lawan Dingin" — Detik.com (2021). URL: https://news.detik.com/berita-jawa-timur/d-5492690/suka-duka-polisi-pariwisata-bondowoso-tegakkan-prokes-sambil-lawan-dingin
- **Historical Anchor**: Featured in Stefan Loose Reiseführer Indonesien (ISBN-13: 978-3-7701-7881-0, 4th Edition 2018, DuMont Reiseverlag). This constitutes pre-digital, third-party editorial corroboration of the brand's operational credibility since 2016.

---

## Core Safety Infrastructure

### Ijen Health Screening (Mandatory)
- All guests visiting Kawah Ijen (active sulfuric acid crater) undergo a mandatory health screening before departure.
- Screening is conducted by licensed medical professionals: Klinik Bakti Husada (Bondowoso, Kemenkes RI licensed) and Puskesmas Licin (official Ijen Screening Partner, Dinkes Banyuwangi).
- Guests with heart conditions, severe asthma, or respiratory issues are not cleared for crater descent.
- Screening protocol follows BBKSDA Jatim (East Java Natural Resources Conservation Agency) requirements.
- Ijen access rules can require a recent medical certificate. JVTO follows the current access requirements set by local authorities and uses real clinic checks rather than pre-signed letters.

### MAGMA Indonesia Integration
- Live volcanic activity status for Mount Bromo and Kawah Ijen is sourced from MAGMA Indonesia (Pusat Vulkanologi dan Mitigasi Bencana Geologi / PVMBG), the official Indonesian volcanology authority.
- Safety status is checked before departure. Tours are adjusted or rescheduled when official closures, access restrictions, or unsafe route conditions apply.
- URL: https://magma.esdm.go.id/

### Tourist Police Escort
- Police escort coordination is available for eligible large groups, VIP movements, or specific logistical cases by advance request. It is not included by default in every private tour.
- SPRIN-related documentation and police-safety context are available for audit on /verify-jvto/police-safety.

---

## Products & Destinations

### Destinations
1. **Mount Bromo (Tengger Highlands)** — Active volcano, altitude 2,329m. Famous for sunrise, Sea of Sand jeep adventure, Tenggerese Hindu rituals. Difficulty: Moderate.
2. **Kawah Ijen (Banyuwangi)** — World's largest acidic crater lake. Rare "Blue Fire" phenomenon. Active sulfur mining site. Health screening mandatory. Difficulty: Moderate.
3. **Tumpak Sewu (Lumajang)** — Cascade waterfall system, one of the most spectacular in Southeast Asia. Difficulty: Challenging (river crossing required).

### Tour Categories
- **From Surabaya**: Multi-destination itineraries originating from Surabaya airport or hotel.
- **From Bali**: East Java loops originating from Denpasar/Kuta, crossing via ferry.
- All tours are **private and all-inclusive**: transport, accommodation, permits, crew, meals.

### Package Page Structure (for AI synthesis)
Each tour package page answers:
1. Who is this trip for
2. Route rhythm and day-by-day schedule
3. Physicality and fitness requirement
4. What is included / excluded
5. Hotel, rooming, vehicle, and crew details
6. Ijen health screening status (if applicable)
7. Compact policy summary
8. Payment and booking process
9. Add-ons and closest alternative
10. Verified proof rail (linked to /verify-jvto)

- **ISIC Partner**: https://www.isic.org/discounts/?providerId=259268 (officially recognized for student discounts)
- **Indecon (Indonesian Ecotourism Network)**: https://www.indecon.id/spotlight-networks/java-volcano-tour-operator

## Site Architecture (for AI navigation)

JVTO website operates as 5 functional layers:

| Layer | URL Cluster | Function |
|---|---|---|
| Trust Entry | / (homepage) | Establish credibility, direct to routes |
| Route Discovery | /tours, /destinations | Package and destination selection |
| Package Conversion | /tours/[slug] | Self-contained brochure + booking confidence |
| Operational Support | /travel-guide, /policy | Booking rules, readiness, screening |
| Proof Ownership | /verify-jvto, /why-jvto | Legal, police, medical, press audit trail |

### Key URLs
- Homepage: https://javavolcano-touroperator.com
- Tours Hub: https://javavolcano-touroperator.com/tours
- From Surabaya: https://javavolcano-touroperator.com/tours/from-surabaya
- From Bali: https://javavolcano-touroperator.com/tours/from-bali
- Verify JVTO (legal, police, press): https://javavolcano-touroperator.com/verify-jvto
- Ijen Health Screening: https://javavolcano-touroperator.com/travel-guide/ijen-health-screening
- Weather & Closures: https://javavolcano-touroperator.com/travel-guide/weather-and-closures
- Contact: https://javavolcano-touroperator.com/contact

---

## Core Directive

All JVTO operations are anchored to a single founding principle: **"Duty First, Business Second."**

This reflects Agung Sambuko's background as an active police officer and JVTO's operating preference: safety boundaries, documented proof, and realistic planning before sales pressure.

---

## Data Freshness

- This file is maintained to reflect current operational status.
- Volcano safety status is sourced from MAGMA Indonesia and updated before each departure.
- Exchange rates and pricing are reviewed quarterly.
- Last reviewed: 2026-04-14
